text:
There once was a boy named Timmy who lived in the country. He had a big backyard full of flowers and trees. Late one afternoon, after a visit from his granny who spoke endlessly about historical ducks, he noticed something shiny by the path. Carefully picking it up, he discovered a beautiful stone.

Every day after school, Timmy would carry this stone home. He imagined it as a magical thing — perhaps it was part of a forgotten castle. His friendship with his little sister Lily blossomed over her collection of plush ducks.

One day, while skipping stones through the shimmering pond, an old owl swooped down. Its eyes gleamed with intelligence. "Hello there," it said. "My name's Winston. I'm an owl who has time-travelled."

Timmy was enchanted. Winston regaled him with tales of past moons, cities made of ice, and forests alive with fairy lanterns. They spent countless afternoons together, exchanging stories while nibbling on
